title: juncus inflexus var. longicornis
intro: Juncus inflexus var. longicornis, also known as long-stemmed rushes or soft rush, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus inflexus var. longicornis include reducing swelling and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by drying and crushing the plant's stems and leaves, and using them as needed for medicinal purposes.
